name: Metro Pawn & Loan
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Council Bluffs, IA offering collateral-based loans, jewelry sales/repairs, and cash for used items including electronics, tools, firearms, and musical instruments.
description_long:
Metro Pawn and Loan is a family-owned and operated pawn shop located at 3011 West Broadway in Council Bluffs, Iowa. The business has been operating for almost 20 years and positions itself as a local alternative to quick cash solutions through collateral-based lending.

The company offers pawn loans at competitive rates as their primary financial service, allowing customers to borrow money by using personal items as collateral. They buy, sell, and trade a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry (gold, silver, diamonds), tools and equipment, electronics, firearms and sporting goods, and musical instruments. They also provide jewelry repair services and offer on-the-spot appraisals for items customers wish to pawn or sell. Customers can walk out with instant cash after selling unwanted items or receive loan proceeds against collateral.

Metro Pawn positions itself as a "family-owned" business emphasizing personal service and fair pricing. They highlight nearly 20 years of operational history and stress "quality products and services" during customer visits. The business markets itself as your local "Pawn Stars," leveraging the popular television show's brand recognition to attract customers seeking quick cash without credit checks.

As a pawn shop, Metro Pawn provides access to quick cash without credit requirements or traditional lending qualification hurdles. However, pawn loans typically carry higher costs than traditional personal loans due to short terms and interest rates. The business operates on a barter/collateral model rather than credit-based lending, making it suitable only for those with valuable items and immediate cash needs. No information is available regarding APR, loan terms, redemption periods, or regulatory compliance details on their website.
pros: Nearly 20 years of operational history in Council Bluffs community
No credit check or qualification requirements for pawn loans
Instant cash available on-the-spot after item appraisal
Diverse inventory including jewelry, tools, electronics, firearms, instruments, and sporting goods
Professional appraisal services for accurate valuations
Convenient location with extended hours (10 AM–6 PM Monday–Saturday)
cons: Pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates and fees than traditional personal loans
Website lacks transparency on APR, loan terms, redemption periods, and interest rate structures
Limited to customers with valuable items to pledge as collateral
No information provided about regulatory licensing, compliance certifications, or consumer protections
Pawn transactions result in loss of personal property if loans cannot be repaid
best_for: Customers with valuable items needing immediate cash without credit checks
People seeking to buy or trade used jewelry, tools, electronics, or musical instruments
Those needing jewelry repair services in the Council Bluffs area
Individuals looking to sell unwanted possessions for instant cash
diagnosis: Metro Pawn & Loan is best suited for customers with valuable collateral who need immediate cash and lack access to traditional credit. Primary caveat: pawn loans carry higher costs than conventional lending, and customers risk losing pledged items if unable to repay within the loan term.
services: Pawn loans against collateral at competitive rates
Buying used jewelry, tools, electronics, firearms, and sporting goods
Gold and silver appraisal and buying
Instant cash disbursement for sold items
